name: YouTube

shortcuts.open_home: g h (gmail-style two-key sequence; press g, then h)

workflows.search_and_play: Press / to focus the top search box. Type the song / video name. Press Enter. The results page loads. Click the first thumbnail in the results (or press Tab + Enter to keyboard-pick the first card).
workflows.play_song_by_artist: Search '<artist name> <song name>'. Click the topmost result that shows a music note icon or 'Official' / 'VEVO' / 'Topic' channel badge. Those are the canonical uploads — skip cover / fan-made versions unless the user asked for them.
workflows.play_first_recommended: On the home page (g h) or after watching a video, click the first thumbnail in the recommendation grid. The autoplay queue takes over from there.
workflows.queue_video: Hover the thumbnail until a small menu icon (3 dots ⋮) or 'Add to queue' button appears, click it. On the watch page right sidebar, hover a video and click the queue icon.
workflows.save_to_watch_later: On a video page: click 'Save' under the player → 'Watch later'. From a thumbnail: hover, click ⋮, 'Save to Watch later'. Watch Later is accessible via g w shortcut or sidebar.
workflows.subscribe: On a channel or watch page, click the 'Subscribe' button (red while unsubscribed, gray pill 'Subscribed' once active). Bell icon next to it controls notification level.
workflows.like_video: Click the thumbs-up icon under the player. Re-click to un-like. Dislike is a separate button beside it.
workflows.comment: Scroll below the player past the description until the Comments section. Click 'Add a comment…' input. Type. Click the blue 'Comment' button.
workflows.change_quality: Click the gear icon (⚙) in the player controls. Click 'Quality'. Pick a resolution (Auto, 1080p, 720p, …). Sticks for that session.
workflows.change_speed: Gear icon → 'Playback speed' → pick 0.25 / 0.5 / 0.75 / Normal / 1.25 / 1.5 / 1.75 / 2. Or use shift+, / shift+. to step down/up.
workflows.enable_captions: Press c. If the video has no auto-captions the key does nothing. For language / size: gear → Subtitles/CC → Options.
workflows.fullscreen: Press f. ESC exits fullscreen. To exit fullscreen but keep playing, press f again.
workflows.picture_in_picture: Press i for YouTube's miniplayer (stays inside the browser). For OS-level Picture-in-Picture in Chrome/Edge, right-click the video TWICE (first right-click opens YouTube's menu, second one opens the browser menu) and pick 'Picture in picture'.
workflows.go_to_subscriptions: Press g then s, or click 'Subscriptions' in the left sidebar.
workflows.open_channel_from_video: Click the channel name (under the video title) or its avatar. Lands on the channel's Home tab.
workflows.find_in_video: There's no in-video keyword search. Use the Transcript: click '...more' under the title to expand the description, then click 'Show transcript'. Ctrl+F inside the transcript pane finds words.
workflows.share_link: Click 'Share' under the player → 'Copy' button. Generates a shortened youtu.be link. Toggle 'Start at' to pin the current timestamp.
workflows.create_playlist: Save → 'Create new playlist'. Type name. Pick visibility (Public/Unlisted/Private). Click 'Create'.
workflows.skip_ad: Wait 5 seconds. A 'Skip Ad' button appears in the bottom-right of the player — click it. Some ads are unskippable; the countdown runs to 0 and the video resumes. Ad-blocker prompts may appear separately — see TIPS.

layout.top_bar: Logo on the left (click → home). Search box in the center (press / to focus, has a magnifying-glass submit button and a microphone for voice). Right side: Create button (camera +), Notifications (bell), Apps grid, Account avatar.
layout.left_sidebar: Home, Shorts, Subscriptions, History, Playlists, Your videos, Watch later, Liked videos. Below: Subscriptions list. Below that: Explore (Trending, Music, Gaming, …). Collapsible — toggle with the hamburger ☰ icon top-left.
layout.home_grid: Three columns of thumbnail cards on desktop. Each card shows thumbnail / title / channel / view count / age / duration overlay (bottom-right of thumbnail).
layout.watch_page: Player at top-left. Title below. Channel + Subscribe + action row (Like / Dislike / Share / Save / ...) right under the player. Description with '...more' to expand. Comments below description. Right sidebar: 'Up next' autoplay toggle + recommended video list.
layout.player_controls: Bottom strip on hover: play/pause / next / volume / time / settings (⚙) / miniplayer / theater mode / fullscreen. Progress bar above the strip; chapter markers if the video has chapters.
layout.search_results: Filter bar at top ('Filters' chip → date / type / duration / sort). Then a stack of cards: thumbnail-left, metadata-right. Channel results and Playlist results render distinct cards mixed in with videos.
layout.channel_page: Banner at top. Tabs: Home / Videos / Shorts / Playlists / Community / Channels / About / Search. 'Subscribe' button beside the channel name.
layout.shorts: Vertical full-height player; swipe / arrow keys to next short. Like / Comment / Share buttons stacked vertically on the right of the video.

tips: YouTube IS a website. To start a YouTube task from a non-YouTube context, use open_url('https://www.youtube.com') — do NOT try to find a 'YouTube app' or type 'youtube' into a Start-menu / Spotlight search.
Single-letter shortcuts (k, m, f, c, j, l, etc.) only fire when the search box is NOT focused. If a shortcut seems dead, click the player or press Escape first to defocus the search box, then retry.
The video itself does not need to be clicked for keyboard shortcuts — focus anywhere inside the watch page works as long as no input is focused.
Auto-play is on by default. After a video ends YouTube loads the next 'Up next' recommendation in ~5 seconds. Toggle the Autoplay slider in the right sidebar to disable.

Pre-roll / mid-roll ads. Free accounts see ads at video start, video middle, and sometimes end. 'Skip Ad' button appears 5 s into a skippable ad in the bottom-right of the player. Some ads are unskippable (15-30 s) — wait for the countdown.

Age-restricted videos require a signed-in Google account confirmed to be 18+. The video player shows 'Sign in to confirm your age' and a Sign-in button. Without a logged-in account the task is blocked — give_up with reason 'age-restricted video requires sign-in'.

Ad-blocker detection. If the user has an ad-blocker enabled, YouTube may show a modal 'Ad blockers are not allowed on YouTube' with 'Allow YouTube ads' and 'Try YouTube Premium' buttons. The modal blocks playback. Either disable the blocker for youtube.com (out of agent scope — give_up) or close the modal with Escape if it allows dismissal.

Music videos on YouTube vs. YouTube Music. youtube.com hosts user uploads (official + fan). music.youtube.com is the dedicated music service with a different layout and ad-free behavior for Premium users. If the user said 'play a song' and the choice is ambiguous, prefer youtube.com — it works without subscription.
Search ranking quirk: the top result is sometimes an ad ('Sponsored' label or yellow 'Ad' tag). The 'first real video' is the first card WITHOUT that label.

Live streams and Premieres show a red 'LIVE' or scheduled-time pill on the thumbnail. Playback semantics differ — live streams have a Chat sidebar and no scrubbing past 'now'; Premieres count down before they go live.

URL shortcuts you can navigate to directly (skip search):  www.youtube.com/results?search_query=<URI-encoded query>  jumps straight to search results.  www.youtube.com/feed/subscriptions  lands on the subscriptions feed.  www.youtube.com/playlist?list=WL  is the Watch Later playlist (requires sign-in).

Mobile redirect. If the URL the agent navigated to is m.youtube.com (Mobile site, sometimes opens on a tablet-mode browser), the layout differs and most desktop shortcuts don't work. Force desktop by stripping the 'm.' subdomain.

Channels named '<Artist> - Topic' (e.g. 'Adele - Topic') are auto-generated Music channels — the cleanest source for an artist's discography. Prefer those over fan channels when the user names an artist + song.
